title: verbascum × candelabrum
intro: Verbascum × candelabrum, also known as Candle-flax or Candelabra Foxglove, is a hybrid plant of the Verbascum genus, characterized by its tall, upright spikes of white or yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of saponins and mucilage in its leaves. The health benefits of Verbascum × candelabrum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Verbascum × candelabrum can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
